backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a lead management system with functions to submit contact forms, check submission status, retrieve individual leads, and get all leads sorted by name and email.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including hero section, trust bar, about section, services section, and their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, hooks, styling, and configuration for the insurance portfolio website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining luxury dark background, gold/blue accents, and sidebar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Insurance Agent Portfolio Website.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component composing Header, all page sections (Hero, Trust, About, Services, WhyChoose, Testimonials, EmotionalClose, Contact), Footer, FloatingWhatsApp, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component with mission-driven storytelling, four value cards (Realization, Mission-Driven, Family Protection, Transparency), and key message about designing financial safety systems.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact form component with name/phone/email/message fields, backend integration via useSubmitContactForm hook, submission status checking, WhatsApp quick connect, and calendar booking placeholder.
frontend/src/components/EmotionalCloseSe: Emotional urgency section with time-sensitive messaging, scarcity copy, prominent CTA button scrolling to contact form, and three benefit cards (Free, 30 Min, Custom).
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button positioned bottom-right with pulse animation, gold styling, and pre-filled message link.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, attribution link to caffeine.ai, and insurance disclaimer text with luxury styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll effects, desktop/mobile menu toggle, smooth scrolling to page sections, and CTA button for booking consultations.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with background image, animated gradient overlays, professional portrait, headline text, and dual CTAs for consultation booking and custom protection plans.
Services showcase section displaying five insurance service cards (life, health, term, investment, retirement) with icons, descriptions, emotional value propositions, and CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Testimonials section featuring four client stories with 5-star ratings, before/after transformation narratives, and detailed quotes in a card grid layout.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: Trust indicators bar displaying five statistics with icons (licensed status, families protected, claim success rate, satisfaction rating, certification) in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Benefits section listing seven key differentiators (personalized strategy, claim support, transparency, etc.) in a two-column grid with checkmark icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, using React Query for caching and automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for contact form submission, checking submission status, and fetching all leads from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark luxury theme colors (navy/black, gold, electric blue), custom utilities for glassmorphism cards, glow effects, and gradient animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with custom colors (luxury-dark, accent-gold, accent-blue), fonts (Montserrat, Poppins), border radius, shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a high-converting insurance agent portfolio website with dark luxury theme, 8 main sections, conversion-focused UX, and required image specifications.
